name: chain_i_screen_deal_flow_for_an_earlystage_sy
method: I screen deal flow for an early-stage syndicate

stages.task: Pull today's startups from HN Show HN + PH + r/startups + r/SideProject
Score each on: traction signals, team credibility, market size keywords, revenue mentioned. Filter top 10%.
Generate 1-page deal memo per qualified startup using claude -p. Format: problem/solution/traction/red flags/verdict.
Convert top 3 memos into Twitter threads and LinkedIn posts about startup trends. Route to posting queue.
